THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, MIGUEL ANGEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT.
